data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a hard block when required forms are missing. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or validated. The linked use case explicitly states the need for a hard block if required forms are missing, but the absence of any related evidence indicates a gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of hard block functionality when required forms are missing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for hard block on missing forms
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the system blocks booking if required forms are not signed.
